sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_kong_extend_t (personnelid,nativeplace,contractperson,jointtype,incontrollevel,suspectaffair,isassign,jurisdictunit1,jurisdictpolice1,policephone1,jurisdictunit2,jurisdictpolice2,policephone2,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo,zptime,classify,classifydetail) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$nativeplace$','$contractperson$',$jointtype$,'$incontrollevel$','$suspectaffair$',$isassign$,'$jurisdictunit1$','$jurisdictpolice1$','$policephone1$','$jurisdictunit2$','$jurisdictpolice2$','$policephone2$',1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$','$zptime$','$classify$','$classifydetail$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_kong_extend_t SET isassign=$isassign$, jurisdictunit1 = $jurisdictunit1$, jurisdictpolice1=$jurisdictpolice1$,policephone1='$policephone1$', jurisdictunit2='$jurisdictunit2$',jurisdictpolice2='$jurisdictpolice2$',policephone2='$policephone2$', updateoperator='$updateoperator$',zptime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$

UPDATE p_kong_extend_t SET incontrollevel='$incontrollevel$',updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$'
gdreason='$gdreason$'
WHERE id = $id$

UPDATE p_kong_extend_t SET incontrollevel='$incontrollevel$',updateoperator='$updateoperator$',gdtime='$gdtime$'
gdreason='$gdreason$'
WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_kong_extend_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_kong_extend_t SET tz=$tz$ WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select:
SELECT count(1) FROM p_kong_extend_t t2, p_personnel_t t1 LEFT JOIN sys_department_t t3 ON t1.jdunit1 = t3.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t t4 ON t1.jdunit2 = t4.id WHERE t1.validflag > 0 and t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid
t1.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
t1.personname like '%$personname$%'
t1.sexes like '%$sexes$%'
t2.nativeplace like '%$nativeplace$%'
t1.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
t2.jointtype = $jointtype$
t2.isassign = $isassign$
t2.incontrollevel like '%$incontrollevel$%'
t1.jdunit1 = '$jurisdictunit1$'
(t1.jdunit1=$filtervalue$ or t1.jdunit2=$filtervalue$)
(t1.jdpolice1=$filtervalue$ or t1.jdpolice2=$filtervalue$)

SELECT t1.id,t1.cardnumber,t1.personname,t1.sexes,t1.homeplace,t1.persontype,t1.homepolice, t2.personnelid,t2.oldpersonnelid,t2.nativeplace,t2.contractperson,t2.jointtype,t2.incontrollevel,t2.suspectaffair,t2.controltime,t2.cometime, t2.leavetime,t2.comereason,t2.engagedwork,t2.identity,t2.serviceplace,t2.religion,t2.suspiciousthing,t2.featuresphoto,t2.isassign,t2.jurisdictunit1, t2.jurisdictpolice1,t2.policephone1,t2.old_jurisdictunit1,t2.old_jurisdictpolice1,t2.jurisdictunit2,t2.jurisdictpolice2,t2.policephone2, t2.old_jurisdictunit2,t2.old_jurisdictpolice2,t2.validflag,t2.addoperator,t2.addtime,t2.updateoperator,t2.updatetime,t2.memo,t2.tz,t2.gdreason,t2.zptime, t2.id as personlabel, t2.id as kongextendid,t2.gdtime, t3.departname as isFilter, t4.departname as filtervalue, u1.staffName as qq, u2.staffName as wechat FROM p_kong_extend_t t2, p_personnel_t t1 LEFT JOIN sys_department_t t3 ON t1.jdunit1 = t3.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t t4 ON t1.jdunit2 = t4.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t u1 on t1.jdpolice1=u1.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t u2 on t1.jdpolice2=u2.id WHERE t1.validflag > 0 and t2.validflag > 0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid
t1.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
t1.personname like '%$personname$%'
t1.sexes like '%$sexes$%'
t2.nativeplace like '%$nativeplace$%'
t1.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
t2.jointtype = $jointtype$
t2.isassign = $isassign$
t2.incontrollevel like '%$incontrollevel$%'
t1.jdunit1 = '$jurisdictunit1$'
(t1.jdunit1=$filtervalue$ or t1.jdunit2=$filtervalue$)
(t1.jdpolice1=$filtervalue$ or t1.jdpolice2=$filtervalue$)
ORDER BY t2.zptime desc,t1.jdunit1,t1.jdunit2,t1.homeplace
ORDER BY t2.gdtime desc,t1.jdunit1,t1.jdunit2,t1.homeplace
$sortsql$,t2.zptime desc,t1.jdunit1,t1.jdunit2,t1.homeplace
$GDsortsql$,t2.gdtime desc,t1.jdunit1,t1.jdunit2,t1.homeplace

SELECT rt.*, GROUP_CONCAT( ft1.fileName ORDER BY ft1.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS filesname, GROUP_CONCAT( ft1.fileallName ORDER BY ft1.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS filesallname FROM p_kong_extend_t rt LEFT JOIN sys_file_t ft1 ON FIND_IN_SET( ft1.id, rt.featuresphoto ) WHERE rt.validflag > 0 AND rt.personnelid = $personnelid$ GROUP BY rt.id
SELECT * FROM p_kong_extend_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND id = $id$

SELECT gt.*,CASE gt.jointtype WHEN 0 THEN '' WHEN 1 THEN '红色' WHEN 2 THEN '橙色' WHEN 3 THEN '黄色' WHEN 4 THEN '蓝色' END as jointtypename, pt.personname,pt.cardnumber,pt.sexes,pt.usedname,pt.nickname,pt.marrystatus, pt.soldierstatus,pt.heathstatus,pt.politicalposition,pt.nation,pt.personheight, pt.faith,pt.education,pt.persontype,pt.houseplace,pt.housepolice,pt.netskillhabit, pt.homepolice,pt.workplace,pt.workpolice,pt.feature,pt.homeplace, pt.speciality,pt.records,rt.telnumber,rt.telephone,rt.relatedwifi,rt.relatedvehicle, rt.bankaccount,rt.netidentity,rt.netpayment,rt.relatedhouse, rt.relatedlegal,rt.relateddriver,rt.relatedpassport, IFNULL(dt.departname,'') AS jdunit1,IFNULL(ut.staffName,'') AS jdpolice1,pt.pphone1,IFNULL(dt.departcode,'') AS jdunit2, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(IF(st.appellation='其他',st.memo,st.appellation),':',st.personname,',',st.cardnumber) ORDER BY FIELD(st.relationtype,'家庭成员','血缘至亲','近亲姻亲','同行访友','同事朋友','同案人员','其他') SEPARATOR '\r\n' ),'\r\n',3) as appellation FROM p_kong_extend_t gt INNER JOIN p_personnel_t pt ON gt.personnelid = pt.id INNER JOIN p_relation_t rt ON gt.personnelid = rt.personnelid LEFT JOIN p_social_relations_t st on st.personnelid=gt.personnelid LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt ON pt.jdunit1=dt.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut ON pt.jdpolice1=ut.id where gt.validflag>0
pt.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
pt.personname like '%$personname$%'
pt.sexes = '$sexes$'
pt.nativeplace = '$nativeplace$'
gt.isassign = $isassign$
pt.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
gt.jointtype = $jointtype$
gt.incontrollevel = '$incontrollevel$'
GROUP BY gt.personnelid order by gt.zptime desc,pt.jdunit1,pt.jdunit2,pt.homeplace

SELECT gt.addtime,gt.addoperator,gt.nativeplace,gt.jointtype,gt.incontrollevel,gt.suspectaffair,gt.controltime,gt.cometime,gt.leavetime, gt.comereason,gt.engagedwork,gt.identity,gt.serviceplace,gt.religion,gt.suspiciousthing,gt.contractperson, CASE gt.jointtype WHEN 0 THEN '' WHEN 1 THEN '红色' WHEN 2 THEN '橙色' WHEN 3 THEN '黄色' WHEN 4 THEN '蓝色' END as jointtypename, pt.personname,pt.cardnumber,pt.sexes,pt.usedname,pt.nickname,pt.marrystatus, pt.soldierstatus,pt.heathstatus,pt.politicalposition,pt.nation,pt.personheight, pt.faith,pt.education,pt.persontype,pt.houseplace,pt.housepolice,pt.netskillhabit, pt.homepolice,pt.workplace,pt.workpolice,pt.feature,pt.homeplace, pt.speciality,pt.records,rt.telnumber,rt.telephone,rt.relatedwifi,rt.relatedvehicle, rt.bankaccount,rt.netidentity,rt.netpayment,rt.relatedhouse, rt.relatedlegal,rt.relateddriver,rt.relatedpassport,ri.accountid as qq,wxri.wechat, sf.fileallName as filesallname,ifnull(sf.validflag,0) as filevalidflag,kb.checkresume, '' AS jdunit1,'' AS jdpolice1,'' AS pphone1,'' AS jdunit2,'' as appellation FROM p_kong_extend_t gt LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t pt ON gt.personnelid = pt.id LEFT JOIN p_relation_t rt ON gt.personnelid = rt.personnelid LEFT JOIN p_relation_identity_t ri ON (ri.personnelid=pt.id and ri.identitytype="QQ") LEFT JOIN p_relation_identity_t wxri ON (wxri.personnelid=pt.id and wxri.identitytype="微信") LEFT JOIN p_personnel_photo_t ph ON (ph.personnelid=pt.id and ph.validflag>0 and ph.defaultflag=1) LEFT JOIN sys_file_t sf ON (sf.id=ph.fileid and sf.validflag>0) LEFT JOIN p_kong_background_t kb on (kb.personnelid=pt.id and kb.validflag>0 and kb.datatype=1) where gt.validflag>0 and pt.id = $personnelid$ order by kb.addtime desc limit 1

SELECT count(1) FROM(SELECT rt.* FROM p_kong_dailycontrol_t rt
WHERE rt.validflag > 0 AND rt.personnelid = $personnelid$ AND rt.controltype = $controltype$ GROUP BY rt.id ) A, sys_user_t t,sys_department_t d WHERE A.addoperatorid = t.id AND t.departmentid = d.id

SELECT A.*, d.departname AS addoperatordepart FROM(SELECT rt.* FROM p_kong_dailycontrol_t rt
WHERE rt.validflag > 0 AND rt.personnelid = $personnelid$ AND rt.controltype = $controltype$ GROUP BY rt.id ) A, sys_user_t t,sys_department_t d WHERE A.addoperatorid = t.id AND t.departmentid = d.id order by DATE_FORMAT(A.controltime,'%Y-%m-%d %h:%i:%m') desc

select A.*,p.personname from( select * from p_kong_dailycontrol_t where validflag>0 and controltype=#controltype#)A LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on p.id = A.personnelid where p.validflag>0 ORDER BY A.controltime desc limit 7
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_kong_dailycontrol_t (personnelid,controltype,controltime,controlmode,controlcontent,fileattachments,validflag,addoperatorid,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,$controltype$,'$controltime$','$controlmode$','$controlcontent$','$fileattachments$',1,$addoperatorid$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.*, d.departname AS addoperatordepart FROM(SELECT rt.*, GROUP_CONCAT( ft1.fileName ORDER BY ft1.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS filesname, GROUP_CONCAT( ft1.fileallName ORDER BY ft1.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS filesallname FROM p_kong_dailycontrol_t rt LEFT JOIN sys_file_t ft1 ON FIND_IN_SET( ft1.id, rt.fileattachments ) WHERE rt.validflag > 0 AND rt.id = $id$ GROUP BY rt.id ) A, sys_user_t t,sys_department_t d WHERE A.addoperatorid = t.id AND t.departmentid = d.id
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_kong_dailycontrol_t SET controltime='$controltime$',controlmode='$controlmode$',controlcontent='$controlcontent$', fileattachments='$fileattachments$', updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.*, d.departname AS addoperatordepart FROM(SELECT rt.*, GROUP_CONCAT( ft1.fileName ORDER BY ft1.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS filesname, GROUP_CONCAT( ft1.fileallName ORDER BY ft1.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS filesallname FROM p_kong_dailycontrol_t rt LEFT JOIN sys_file_t ft1 ON FIND_IN_SET( ft1.id, rt.fileattachments ) WHERE rt.validflag > 0 AND rt.personnelid = $personnelid$ AND rt.controltype = $controltype$ GROUP BY rt.id ) A, sys_user_t t,sys_department_t d WHERE A.addoperatorid = t.id AND t.departmentid = d.id order by updatetime desc limit 5

SELECT A.*,d.departname AS addoperatordepart FROM ( SELECT rt.*,p.personname,p.cardnumber FROM p_kong_dailycontrol_t rt INNER JOIN p_personnel_t p ON rt.personnelid = p.id WHERE rt.controltype = $controltype$ AND rt.validflag > 0 AND p.validflag > 0
p.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
p.personname like '%$personname$%'
rt.controlmode = '$controlmode$'
STR_TO_DATE(rt.controltime,'%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE('$starttime$','%Y-%m-%d')
STR_TO_DATE('$endtime$','%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE(rt.controltime,'%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY rt.id ) A, sys_user_t t, sys_department_t d, p_kong_extend_t t2 WHERE A.addoperatorid = t.id AND t.departmentid = d.id AND t2.personnelid = A.personnelid AND t2.validflag > 0
(t2.jurisdictunit1=$filtervalue$ or t2.jurisdictunit2=$filtervalue$)
(t2.jurisdictpolice1=$filtervalue$ or t2.jurisdictpolice2=$filtervalue$)
order by DATE_FORMAT(A.controltime,'%Y-%m-%d %h:%i:%m') desc

SELECT A.*,d.departname AS addoperatordepart FROM ( SELECT rt.*,p.personname,p.cardnumber FROM p_kong_dailycontrol_t rt INNER JOIN p_personnel_t p ON rt.personnelid = p.id WHERE rt.controltype = $controltype$ AND rt.validflag > 0 AND p.validflag > 0
p.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
p.personname like '%$personname$%'
rt.controlmode = '$controlmode$'
STR_TO_DATE(rt.controltime,'%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE('$starttime$','%Y-%m-%d')
STR_TO_DATE('$endtime$','%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE(rt.controltime,'%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY rt.id ) A, sys_user_t t, sys_department_t d, p_kong_extend_t t2 WHERE A.addoperatorid = t.id AND t.departmentid = d.id AND t2.personnelid = A.personnelid AND t2.validflag > 0
(t2.jurisdictunit1=$filtervalue$ or t2.jurisdictunit2=$filtervalue$)
(t2.jurisdictpolice1=$filtervalue$ or t2.jurisdictpolice2=$filtervalue$)
order by DATE_FORMAT(A.controltime,'%Y-%m-%d %h:%i:%m') desc

SELECT count(1) FROM ( SELECT rt.*,p.personname,p.cardnumber FROM p_kong_dailycontrol_t rt INNER JOIN p_personnel_t p ON rt.personnelid = p.id WHERE rt.controltype = $controltype$ AND rt.validflag > 0 AND p.validflag > 0
p.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
p.personname like '%$personname$%'
rt.controlmode = '$controlmode$'
STR_TO_DATE(rt.controltime,'%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE('$starttime$','%Y-%m-%d')
STR_TO_DATE('$endtime$','%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE(rt.controltime,'%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY rt.id ) A, sys_user_t t, sys_department_t d, p_kong_extend_t t2 WHERE A.addoperatorid = t.id AND t.departmentid = d.id AND t2.personnelid = A.personnelid AND t2.validflag > 0
(t2.jurisdictunit1=$filtervalue$ or t2.jurisdictunit2=$filtervalue$)
(t2.jurisdictpolice1=$filtervalue$ or t2.jurisdictpolice2=$filtervalue$)

select A.jointtype,CASE A.jointtype WHEN 1 THEN '红色' WHEN 2 THEN '橙色' WHEN 3 THEN '黄色' WHEN 4 THEN '蓝色' END as jointtypename,count(p.id) as personcount from( select 1 as jointtype from dual UNION select 2 as jointtype from dual UNION select 3 as jointtype from dual UNION select 4 as jointtype from dual)A LEFT JOIN p_kong_extend_t k on k.jointtype=A.jointtype and k.validflag>0 LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on p.id=k.personnelid and p.validflag>0 GROUP BY A.jointtype ORDER BY A.jointtype

select A.jointtype,CASE A.jointtype WHEN 1 THEN '红色' WHEN 2 THEN '橙色' WHEN 3 THEN '黄色' WHEN 4 THEN '蓝色' END as text,count(p.id) as value from( select 1 as jointtype from dual UNION select 2 as jointtype from dual UNION select 3 as jointtype from dual UNION select 4 as jointtype from dual)A LEFT JOIN p_kong_extend_t k on k.jointtype=A.jointtype and k.incontrollevel='在控' and k.validflag>0 LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on p.id=k.personnelid and p.validflag>0 GROUP BY A.jointtype ORDER BY A.jointtype

SELECT A.basicname as nativeplace,count(p.id) as personcount FROM( select * from sys_basic_msg_t where basicType=51 and validflag>0 ORDER BY id)A LEFT JOIN p_kong_extend_t k on A.basicName = k.nativeplace and k.validflag>0 LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on p.id = k.personnelid and p.validflag>0 GROUP BY A.id

SELECT A.basicname as text,count(p.id) as value FROM( select * from sys_basic_msg_t where basicType=51 and validflag>0 ORDER BY id)A LEFT JOIN p_kong_extend_t k on A.basicName = k.nativeplace and k.incontrollevel='在控' and k.validflag>0 LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on p.id = k.personnelid and p.validflag>0 GROUP BY A.id ORDER BY value desc limit 5;

select A.departname as jurisdictunit,count(p.id) as personcount from( select * from sys_department_t where validflag>0 and departtype=4 order by id)A LEFT JOIN p_kong_extend_t k on (k.jurisdictunit1=A.id or k.jurisdictunit2=A.id) and k.validflag>0 LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on p.id=k.personnelid and p.validflag>0 GROUP BY A.id

SELECT t1.cardnumber,t1.personname,t1.sexes,t1.homeplace,t1.persontype,u.contactnumber as policephone1,u1.contactnumber as policephone2 FROM p_kong_extend_t t2, p_personnel_t t1 left join p_kong_dailycontrol_t dc on dc.personnelid=t1.id and dc.validflag>0 and controltype=2 and controltime like CONCAT('%',DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m'),'%') left join sys_user_t u on u.id=t1.jdpolice1 and u.validflag>0 left join sys_user_t u1 on u1.id=t1.jdpolice2 and u1.validflag>0 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 and t2.validflag > 0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.incontrollevel like '%在控%' and dc.id is null and t2.jointtype!=4

select A.* from( SELECT t1.cardnumber,t1.personname,u.contactnumber as policephone1,u1.contactnumber as policephone2,DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(now(),INTERVAL t2.controltime day),'%Y-%m-%d') as limitdate,t1.id FROM p_kong_extend_t t2, p_personnel_t t1 left join sys_user_t u on u.id=t1.jdpolice1 and u.validflag>0 left join sys_user_t u1 on u1.id=t1.jdpolice2 and u1.validflag>0 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 and t2.validflag > 0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.incontrollevel like '%在控%')A left join p_kong_dailycontrol_t dc on dc.personnelid=A.id and dc.validflag>0 and controltype=1 and controltime>A.limitdate where dc.id is null

SELECT t1.cardnumber,t1.personname,u.contactnumber as policephone1,u1.contactnumber as policephone2,t1.id FROM p_kong_extend_t t2, p_personnel_t t1 left join sys_user_t u on u.id=t1.jdpolice1 and u.validflag>0 left join sys_user_t u1 on u1.id=t1.jdpolice2 and u1.validflag>0 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 and t2.validflag > 0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.incontrollevel like '%在控%' and DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(now(),INTERVAL 9 day),'%Y-%m-%d')>t2.updatetime
